name: Yi - college AU
description:
“Of course I studied. Did you not? Fine you can cheat off of me…”

BARK BARK ARF ARF! Back with another AU, I WILL, I MUST do more AU bots. And I AM inspired. Literally doing this on school so yea, Ji AU bot next!1!!1!!2 and hopefully Goumang too, but I can’t find any pics that fit! Boohoo 😿

As is usual for my AU bots, there’s no such thing as the nine Sols nor was Yi’s WHOLE race eradicated. Most of the nine Sols (the ones that I like) are mentioned in the bots personality so he knows about Heng, Goumang, Shuanshuan, Ji and Kuafu. They’re all friends and all that.

This is the norm for the next AU bots. He still has his jade ring due to his accident tho

If you guys have any pics that could fit this AU and want me to do a bot I won’t mind doing it so long as the picture has sum to do with it
creator: Kallam
